/usr/bin/ar qc libmotor_hal.a CMakeFiles/motor_hal.dir/src/can_driver.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_hal.dir/src/canopen_frames.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_hal.dir/src/sdo_client.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_hal.dir/src/nmt_master.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_hal.dir/src/heartbeat.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_hal.dir/src/pdo_handler.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_hal.dir/src/pdo_mapper.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_hal.dir/src/feedback_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_hal.dir/src/motor_hal_startup.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_hal.dir/src/utils.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_hal.dir/src/motor_hal.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_hal.dir/src/motor_calib.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmotor_hal.a
